skills.name: Praise
skills.description: Hunter and the Companion go wild, increasing the damage dealt to enemies. Becomes immune to knockbacks and knockdowns.
skills.effect_text:
Final Damage of Basic Attack/Hunter's attack skill increases by CaptionRatio %
Duration of Final Damage increased: 10 seconds
Knockback, Knockdown immune Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor %
Growling Cycle CaptionTime seconds
Forced Threat Duration: 3 seconds
Number of targets CaptionRatio

skills.name: Howling
skills.description: The Companion threatens the enemy with a howl. The stats of the threatened enemies are reduced.
skills.effect_text:
Critical Rate, Accuracy, Evasion - CaptionRatio %
Number of Target CaptionRatio2
Duration: CaptionTime second(s)

skills.name: Bolas
skills.description: Throw the bolas at the target point to temporarily bind enemies in the area.
skills.stance: TwoHandBow BowAndShield BowAndArtefact BowAndDagger Musket TwoHandCannon
skills.effect_text:
Companion's Attack Skill Factor SkillFactor % x3
Number of targets CaptionRatio
[Shackle] Duration: CaptionTime second(s)

skills.name: Bleeding Pierce
skills.description: Fire a sharp projection that penetrates the enemy target in a straight line. It causes a Bleeding effect that gives continuous damage to the target.
skills.stance: TwoHandBow BowAndShield BowAndArtefact BowAndDagger Musket TwoHandCannon
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor %
Bleeding Skill Factor CaptionRatio3 %
Companion's Attack Skill Factor CaptionRatio2 %
Number of targets CaptionRatio
[Bleeding] Duration: CaptionTime second(s)

skills.name: Udang-tang-tang!
skills.description: Summon the companions you have in your companion list to the designated location. Summoned companions randomly attack enemies within range.
skills.stance: TwoHandBow BowAndShield BowAndArtefact BowAndDagger Musket TwoHandCannon
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 1 second
Target: CaptionRatio
Duration: CaptionRatio2 second(s)

skills.name: Attack!
skills.description: Charge the companion to the designated target, causing damage to the target and its surroundings. The companion attacks the target until it dies or there is a separate command.
skills.stance: TwoHandBow BowAndShield BowAndArtefact BowAndDagger Musket TwoHandCannon
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2
Target: CaptionRatio

skills.name: Come Back!
skills.description: Stop the companion's attack and call it back to the Hunter's side. The returned companion does not attack the enemy until ordered to.
skills.stance: TwoHandBow BowAndShield BowAndArtefact BowAndDagger Musket TwoHandCannon

attributes.name: Companion First Aid
attributes.description:
* When companion HP is below 50%, activates [First Aid] effect to recover HP for 2 seconds

Duration is increased by 1 second per attribute level from Lv. 2

[First Aid] cannot be used for another 10 minutes after being activated

attributes.name: Companion Mastery: Evasion
attributes.description: * Companion's damage received by the monster's AoE attack decreases up to 70%

attributes.name: Companion Mastery: Fortitude
attributes.description:
* DEF and CON of the Companion increases by 25%

* ATK of the Companion decreases by 25%

attributes.name: Companion Mastery: Fang
attributes.description:
* ATK of the Companion increases by 25%

* CON of the Companion decreases by 25%

attributes.name: Companion Mastery: Thick Hide
attributes.description: * Companion's physical damage received decreases by 25%

attributes.name: Companion Mastery: Tenacity
attributes.description: * Companion's magic damage received decreases by 25%

attributes.name: Howling: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Howling]'s Critical Rate, Accuracy, and Evasion reducing effect by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Growling: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Growling] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Come Back!: Homing Instinct
attributes.description: * Removes all 'can not move/act' effect from the Companion when casting [Come Back!]

attributes.name: Come Back!: Recovery
attributes.description: * Recovers a certain amount of the Companion's HP when casting [Come Back!] (Cooldown 30 seconds)

attributes.name: Growling: Disabled
attributes.description:
* [Growling] does not provoke the monsters

* The damage of the [Growling] doubles

attributes.name: Bleeding Pierce: Infected Wound
attributes.description:
* [Bleeding Pierce] decreases Movement Speed by 25% and Healing received by 50% instead of the constant damage

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Praise: Trance
attributes.description:
* The Companion becomes temporarily immune to damage received when casting [Praise]

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Attack!: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Attack!] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Bolas: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Bolas] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Bleeding Pierce: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Bleeding Pierce] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Udang-tang-tang!: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Udang-tang-tang!] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Praise: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Praise]'s final damage increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Attack!: Coursing
attributes.description: * Applies a debuff that increases the target's damage received by 10% for 10 seconds when the [Attack!] skill is accurately hit

attributes.name: [Arts] Attack!: Stun
attributes.description: * The target is stunned when the [Attack!] skill is accurately hit (When the target is a Boss, it is not stunned but your skill damage increases by 50%)
